items.title: Knicks fight from 29 points down for record comeback win and 3-1 NBA Finals lead
items.summary: New York Knicks came from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating San Antonio Spurs 107-106 on OG Anunoby's tip-in with 1.2 seconds remaining.

items.summary: South Korea captain Son Heung-min says he feels like a "kid" as he enters his fourth World Cup, where he will debut against the Czech Republic in a Group A match in Guadalajara on Thursday.
